/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/IoTDashboard.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/IoTDashboard.dir/src/DashboardUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IoTDashboard.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IoTDashboard.dir/src/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IoTDashboard.dir/src/SensorSimulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IoTDashboard.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o IoTDashboard  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_ttf.so
